surfaces.name: BeamCore API OpenAPI schema
surfaces.notes: Machine-readable OpenAPI 3.0 schema for the BeamCore control-plane HTTP API (title: BeamCore API). Served publicly at beamcore.b1m.ai; documents orchestrator, worker, validator, and health routes for SN105 Beam.

surfaces.name: BeamCore API health
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /health on beamcore.b1m.ai returning control-plane liveness JSON (ok, db, schema, metagraph sync). Documented in the subnet OpenAPI spec on the same host; beamcore.b1m.ai is the CORE_SERVER_URL configured in the official Beam README.

surfaces.name: BeamCore orchestrator UID range config
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /config/uid-ranges on beamcore.b1m.ai returning the public orchestrator UID window (public_orchestrator_uid_start, public_orchestrator_uid_end, max_orchestrators). Documented as a route in the subnet's own OpenAPI schema (already-registered sn-105-beam-openapi surface); same beamcore.b1m.ai host as the existing health surface.

surfaces.name: Beam routing orchestrators
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET returning active orchestrator nodes (hotkey, url, region). Documented in the subnet's own OpenAPI schema.

surfaces.name: Beam worker capacity
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET returning total and per-orchestrator worker capacity. Documented in the subnet's own OpenAPI schema.
